---
name: Add screenshots and GIF to docs/
about: Add visual assets demonstrating the app
title: Add screenshots and GIF to docs/
labels: ["documentation", "ux"]
assignees: []
---

Create screenshots and a short demo GIF showing wallet generation, signing, and verification. Place assets in `docs/` and link them from the README.

Acceptance criteria:
- At least 2 screenshots and 1 GIF in `docs/`
- README references images and GIF
